description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with clean, angular lines and a striking asymmetrical roof structure. The exterior is predominantly white with black accents, complemented by large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The building is set on a rectangular plot with a patterned sidewalk and landscaped green areas, including a curved driveway and geometric lawn sections. The house appears to be a duplex or multi-unit structure, with two main entrances and multiple balconies or terraces on the upper level. The roof is composed of several slanted shed-style sections, giving the house a dynamic and contemporary appearance. The overall layout suggests a focus on both privacy and openness, with outdoor spaces integrated into the design.
description: A modern, multi-unit house with angular white facades, large windows, and slanted shed roofs, set on a landscaped urban plot with patterned sidewalks and green areas.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrances, large windows, and the distinctive slanted roofs, along with the patterned sidewalk and landscaped lawn.
description_view_1: Direct side view highlighting the vertical window arrangement and the depth of the building, with visible green strips and driveway.
description_view_2: Rear and opposite side view displaying the back balconies, additional windows, and the continuation of the geometric landscaping.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear facade, smaller windows, and the curved driveway leading to the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways are recessed with flat overhangs, wide steps, and minimalistic doors, flanked by large windows and small landscaped areas.
